message:
fix(ui): add React key to spec-evolution-lab inspector for proper remount

The FrankenContainer wrapping the commit inspector panel in the Spec
Evolution Lab lacked a key prop tied to the selected commit. Without
it, React reuses the same DOM node when switching between commits,
which means internal component state (NeuralPulse animation phase,
scroll position, transition states) carries over instead of resetting.

This commit adds key={\`inspector-\${selectedCommit.sha}\`} so that
selecting a different commit forces React to unmount the old inspector
and mount a fresh one, producing clean entry animations and reset
pulse effects for each commit inspection.

The JSX props are also reformatted onto individual lines for improved
readability of the multi-prop FrankenContainer element.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
